Video.summary: The hilarious spoof "Went With The Wind!" is presented for your entertainment. Dinah Shore guest stars.
Video.title: Dinah Shore

Video.summary: The one-of-a-kind Dom DeLuise and the sultry Peggy Lee are Carol's guests for a night of sketches and songs.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Peggy Lee, Dom Deluise

Video.summary: Rock Hudson plays a man on the prowl for the ladies in a bar. Also, Tim is a television announcer.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: The season-ending "Family Show" features the best variety show ensemble on television.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Shirley MacLaine joins Carol in sharing some of their fan mail.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley MacLaine

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell & Ken Berry join in "High Hat", a spoof of Fred Astaire and Ginger Rogers movie musicals.
Video.title: Roddy McDowell, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Sketches include an encounter at a bar between Harvey & Carol, and Carol & Vicki as "Lucky Lady" contestants.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Andy Griffith guests, retelling a familiar Aesop fable in his own inimitable fashion.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Andy Griffith

Video.summary: Lucy and Carol play rival Rent-A-Car agents vying for Tim's business.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring

Video.summary: Don Adams plays a talk show host beset with technical difficulties and Carol's agitated husband.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lesley Ann Warren, Don Adams

Video.summary: Tim Conway stars as a German interrogator in WWII. Carol plays a housewife listening to an advice show.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray stars as Carol's rival. Also, a "V.I.P." interview and a satiric look at foreign airlines.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Guests Rich Little & Eydie Gorme join in a tribute to Alfred Hitchcock! Also: Carol and Harvey play a couple.
Video.title: Rich Little, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Nanette Fabray guest on the season finale, featuring an installment of "As The Stomach Turns".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: The cast of "The Carol Burnett Show" revisits some of their favorite moments from the show.
Video.title: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Image.alt: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers
The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Video.summary: Betty White joins in the latest installment of "The Family" wherein Mama has decided to clean up her attic.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters join Carol in a rockin' musical spoof of "Cinderella" in tonight's episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Tim as they spoof a classic Joan Crawford film in the sketch "Mildred Fierce."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway contributes in sketches as the Lone Ranger and as a man who lives a dog's life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Video.summary: Vicki plays an author whose changes to her story are acted out, and Tim demonstrates the latest in safety.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Mama, Eunice, and Ed return from an inspiring Sunday sermon.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Sketches include Carol as an old lady feeding birds, Tim as a wacky pharmacist, and Carol & Vicki on a cruise.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tonight, Tim and Carol spar over a late-night phone call.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Ms. Betty White stars! Betty plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates. Also, Carol & Tim lose sleep.
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Mama, Eunice, and Ed return from an inspiring Sunday sermon. Also: Carol & Harvey share "Bedtime Honesty."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Mickey Rooney star in a meeting between First Ladies, an audition, and the spoof "Kids Town."
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: Don Adams guest stars. Don plays a talk show host, Carol's husband in "The Lost Purse," and a griping father.
Video.title: Don Adams

Video.summary: Tim and Carol spar over a call, Tim tries to sell Vicki a vacuum, and the gang performs a musical recital.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway appears in a sketch where two policemen go undercover. Also: a poker game on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Tim Conway guest, with Martha in a sketch about mothers, and Tim as "The Virgin Prince."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Paul Sand guest. Paul plays a man seeking confidence, and Steve joins "The Putrified Forest."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests. Features Harvey's Emmy Award speech, and a presentation of "Hollywood Canteen."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Tim Conway steals Carol's heart in a sketch about two shoppers, steals scenes as an extra, and steals a mint.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: John Byner & Petula Clark star. TV commercial spoofs and the firing of Donald Duck are on tap tonight.
Video.title: John Byner, Petula Clark

Video.summary: Guests Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, & David Frost join for an operatic, Italian-style Cinderella production.
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Image.alt: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
